name: AI Provider Foundation
features_completed: AiProviderRegistry — system-wide catalog of provider types (reno_brain, claude, openai, google)
Registry seeded in migration: reno_brain (built-in, enabled), claude (optional), openai (optional), google (disabled by default)
TenantAiConsent — per-tenant explicit consent records with full revocation support
AiProviderAuditLog — immutable audit trail per provider (call, test, enable, disable, consent, revoke, fallback, key_update)
BrainProviderConfig extended: encryptedApiKey, keyHint, consentVerified, status, fallbackProvider, fallbackEnabled, moduleOverrides
crypto.service.ts — AES-256-GCM encryption/decryption for API keys at rest
ai-provider.service.ts — provider resolution, consent check, automatic fallback to Reno Brain, module-level overrides
callWithProvider() — unified call function with fallback logic and automatic audit logging
saveProviderApiKey() — encrypts key before storage, returns only hint
grantConsent() / revokeConsent() — full consent lifecycle management
logProviderAudit() — non-throwing audit writer (never crashes on audit failure)
POST /admin/ai/providers — create provider config
PUT /admin/ai/providers/:id/key — set encrypted API key (key never stored in response)
PATCH /admin/ai/providers/:id — update provider settings
DELETE /admin/ai/providers/:id — remove provider config
POST /admin/ai/providers/:id/test — live connection test
GET /admin/ai/registry — list available provider types
GET /admin/ai/consent — tenant consent status
POST /admin/ai/consent — grant consent with text acknowledgment
DELETE /admin/ai/consent/:providerSlug — revoke consent (deactivates provider config)
GET /admin/ai/audit — provider audit log with filters
GET /admin/ai/status — overall AI status for tenant
Web: Settings → AI Providers page with consent flow, key modal, audit log, test button
security_checks: PASS: Reno Brain untouched — existing behavior unchanged
PASS: External providers disabled by default (requires explicit consent + key)
PASS: API keys encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM (ENCRYPTION_KEY env var)
PASS: Only masked key hint returned to frontend (e.g. sk-a...4cde)
PASS: Consent required before any external provider is active
PASS: Consent revocation immediately deactivates provider config
PASS: Every provider operation logged to AiProviderAuditLog
PASS: Automatic fallback to Reno Brain on API failure or missing consent
PASS: tenantId scoped on all consent and audit queries
PASS: No cross-tenant data access in any provider query

extendedModels: BrainProviderConfig — added encryptedApiKey, keyHint, consentVerified, status, statusReason, fallbackProvider, fallbackEnabled, moduleOverrides

golden_rules_compliance.doNotReplaceRenoBrain: PASS — Reno Brain is still default, provider.ts unchanged
golden_rules_compliance.claudeMustBeOptional: PASS — claude provider disabled by default, requires consent + key
golden_rules_compliance.externalProviderDisabledByDefault: PASS — requires_consent=true, consent_given=false until admin acts
golden_rules_compliance.tenantAdminMustExplicitlyEnable: PASS — consent modal + key setup required
golden_rules_compliance.doNotCrash: PASS — all external calls have fallback to Reno Brain
golden_rules_compliance.doNotExposeApiKeys: PASS — only encrypted storage and masked hints
golden_rules_compliance.doNotSendDataWithoutConsent: PASS — consent checked before every external call
golden_rules_compliance.respectRBAC: PASS — all routes behind standard auth middleware
